title: Smoke Test Strategy Config
description: Strategy-owned config for the smoke-test market-making validation strategy.

quote_interval_ms.description: Refresh interval for cancel-replace quote cycles.

quote_qty.description: Order quantity for each quote side.

buy_tick_distance.description: Buy quote distance below best bid, measured in instrument price ticks.

sell_tick_distance.description: Sell quote distance above best ask, measured in instrument price ticks.
